title: Code of Conduct and Workplace Behavior Expectations
text:
Q: What are the expectations for my behavior at work?
A: Our company expects all employees to maintain a professional and respectful demeanor in the workplace. This includes treating colleagues, clients, and visitors with courtesy and respect, regardless of their background or position. Harassment, discrimination, or any form of bullying is strictly prohibited and will not be tolerated. Employees are also expected to adhere to company policies, including those related to attendance, punctuality, and dress code. Additionally, we encourage open communication and collaboration, fostering a positive work environment. Violations of the code of conduct may result in disciplinary action, up to and including termination.
